record.field: Dear Sir or Madam
Meter reading value {} for point {} must be an integer (no decimal places)!
Meter reading value {} must be greater than last reading value {} for point {}!
Meter ID {} must be the same as last reading for point {}!
Final meter reading value {} must be greater than last reading value {} for point {} and have the same meter ID!
Meter ID {} must not be the same as last reading for final reading for point {}!
First meter reading for point {} must be of type 'initial'!
There is already a meter reading for point {} with reading date {}!
{}: Year of construction ({}) must be a number with 4 digits!
{}: End date ({}) must be less or equal than parent end date ({})!
Object "{}": An occupancy contract already exists for the period from {} to {}. Only one occupancy contract per object is allowed at a time.
Object "{}": Another occupancy contract exists for the period from {} to {}. Do you want to proceed anyway?
Billing unit "{}": At least one settlement unit is required before approval.
Billing unit "{}": At least one term type must be selected before approval.
For WEG Billing, the start date {} must be the first day of the year.
Term "{}": Valid from ({}) must not be before the contract start date ({})!
Term "{}": Valid from ({}) must not be after the contract end date ({})!
Contract item "{}": Valid from ({}) must not be before the contract start date ({})!
Contract item "{}": Valid from ({}) must not be after the contract end date ({})!
Cannot run selection for "%(name)s": not allowed in state '%(state)s'.
Selection for "%(name)s": existing cost shares and settlement results will be deleted. Continue?
Computing value shares for "%(name)s": existing settlement results will be deleted. Continue?
No start reading for "%(name)s" on %(date)s (window: -%(pre)d/+%(post)d days).
No end reading for "%(name)s" on %(date)s (window: -%(pre)d/+%(post)d days).
The following billing units must be billed first (chronological order): %(names)s
Collective billing requires the following billing units to be processed together: %(names)s
Cannot bill: settlement unit(s) have errors in "%(names)s". Fix all errors before billing.
Cannot delete settlement unit "%(name)s": deletion is only allowed when the billing unit is in state 'Draft' (current state: %(state)s).
Cannot delete "%(name)s": deletion is only allowed in state 'Draft' (current state: %(state)s).
Cannot bill "%(name)s": unposted contract cash flow items exist in the settlement period. Post all pending items (CreateMoves) before billing.
Cannot bill "%(name)s": the following advance payment invoices are not yet posted: %(details)s Please post all invoices before billing.
Cannot set "Ready for Billing" for "%(name)s": no approved settlement results found. Please run "Compute Settlement Results" first.
Cannot set "Ready for Billing" for "%(name)s": the following settlement results have actual costs of zero: %(details)s Please enter actual costs for all settlement results before proceeding.
Cannot set "Ready for Billing" for "%(name)s": sum of settlement result actual costs (%(sr_sum)s) does not match cost share sum (%(bu_sum)s). Please recompute settlement results.
Cannot set "Ready for Billing" for "%(name)s": the following settlement units have errors: %(details)s Fix all errors before proceeding.
Cannot set "Ready for Billing" for "%(name)s": the following settlement units have not reached state "value_share": %(details)s Run "Compute Value Shares" for all settlement units first.

Cannot bill property "%(name)s" for period %(next_date)s: collective billing requires all billing units to be selected. The following billing units are missing from the selection: %(details)s Add all billing units of this period to the selection or remove the billing unit filter.

Billing of "%(name)s" for period %(next_date)s aborted: the following billing units are not yet in state "Ready for Billing": %(details)s Either run "Ready for Billing" for each billing unit first, or bill individual billing units directly in the billing unit form.
Contract "{}": existing postings (done cash flow items) will NOT be cancelled automatically. Only draft items have been deleted. Continue with cancellation?
Measurement type "{}": circular reference detected in the group hierarchy!
Measurement type "{}": unit must match the group "{}". Group unit: {}, type unit: {}!
